deviceModel: unknown Android SDK built for x86_64

javascript-features.error:
No WebView debugging sockets found on device emulator-5554.
This usually means:
1. The app is not running
2. The app doesn't have WebView.setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled(true)
3. No WebView has been loaded yet

To fix: Add this to your app's MainActivity onCreate():
  if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.KITKAT) {
    WebView.setWebContentsDebuggingEnabled(true)
  }
